creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm unhappy that this went in without giving devel/llvm90 some time to settle after the release.  Worse it was committed during a conference and I had vacation and international flights scheduled in the 10 days after this so I'm still cleaning up lose ends.  As a matter of good practice, I'd prefer to week at least two weeks delay between the commit of the release version and a LLVM_DEFAULT update.
